IMPORTANT NOTICE

We have become aware that consumers overseas are being contacted by individuals claiming to be employees of Financial Recovery Solutions Ltd. Please note that Financial Recovery Solutions is a UK Claims Management Company and does not operate outside of the UK. We would only ever contact our customers on UK email addresses and from UK telephone numbers. We assist UK customers with financial mis-selling claims. We do not deal with fraud cases, crypto currency or investments of any kind. If you are outside of the UK and are contacted by an individual claiming to be an employee of FRS who is asking for your contact details or requesting money from you, this is likely to be a scam and you should report this to us on info@frsclaims.co.uk and to your relevant local authorities.

About Us

Financial Recovery Solutions Ltd are one of the UK's leading specialists in financial mis-selling cases, representing consumers to recover money from lenders, brokers and insurers which is rightfully theirs. Our aim is to make the process of claiming as easy as possible and we pride ourselves on our expert knowledge and excellent customer service.

Since we began, we have helped thousands of people like you to recover tens of millions of pounds in compensation from the lenders, changing people’s lives.

Our Promise to You

We work hard to make our customers happy

Many of our clients have recommended us to their family and friends.

We respect your privacy

We won't share your information with any third party without your knowledge or consent.

We will be fair, honest and keep you informed

Our staff will always be friendly, helpful and knowledgeable.

  • "After years of 'not bothered', a very quick, easy form came through the post. Literally 10 mins to fill out and post, another 10 mins on the phone and that was it!"


    Mr Edwards received £2,375 from Natwest

  • "I have received two separate refunds so far, incredible as PPI was traced back to pre-1997 and I had no paperwork or idea that I had paid it."


    Mrs Hainey received £1,198 from HBOS

  • "Thank you - excellent professional service. Very 'user friendly', we were surprised at the amount we recovered."


    Mr Toynton received £2,507 from Natwest

  • "Thank you for all your support and help. We are going to have a nice holiday with the money."


    Mr & Mrs Wannop received £1,501 from HBOS

  • "I wouldn't have managed this without your help. You made the process very easy & hassle free, not to mention how friendly, helpful & professional you've all been"


    Mr Georgiou received £1,183 from Capital One

  • "The whole process was really straight forward and to think that money was sitting there waiting for us to claim it – I don’t know why we didn’t do it sooner!"


    Mr & Mrs White received £1,360 from Halifax

  • "FRS service is second to none. Fast, accurate and with only a few signatures needed from me. I would highly recommend this company."


    Mrs Seamarks received £883 from Barclaycard

  • "Contacting FRS is the best thing I have ever done...Apart from reading some paperwork and signing on the dotted line all I’ve done is sit back and let them do all the work."


    Mr Turton received £7,562 from his claims

  • "Would recommend FRS to anyone to conduct business for them, I didn’t even know the PPI they got for me even existed. Many thanks to them."


    Mrs Richardson received £4,164 from HSBC

FRS are a leading Claims Management Company and we have been specialising in claims for mis-sold Payment Protection Insurance (PPI) since 2008. In that time our clients have received tens of millions of pounds in compensation in successful claims.

With a strong focus on customer service and achieving excellent results, many of our clients have recommended us to their friends!

See why our customers regularly rate us 5 stars!

by our clients in successful claims

All figures above show amount calculated after deduction of taxes and fees

Making A Claim

If you had or have a packaged (fee-paying) bank account and weren't aware of or eligible for the policies, speak to us today.

All claims are dealt with in-house by a team of dedicated claims handlers who are experienced in financial mis-selling. FRS has a proven track record in recovering money for clients that is rightfully theirs.

Using state-of-the-art software, we ensure that you are kept up to date with every aspect of your claim so that you have peace of mind that it is being dealt with as efficiently and swiftly as possible. We pride ourselves on exceptional customer service throughout the process - but don’t just take our word for it, check out what our customers have to say here.
